asset.title: App Research Enrich
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates the account enrichment process with a before-and-after state transition and corresponding trace log updates.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows transition from pending accounts to enriched research data.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the before, action, and after states of the enrichment process.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed spreadsheet interface with structured columns.

consistency.evidence: Integrates spreadsheet view, agent sessions, and real-time trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing live trace updates and state changes.

legibility.evidence: Text is legible, though some cell contents are truncated.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for automated GTM research and data enrichment workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the execution trace and data population.

observedEvidence: Status transition from PENDING to COMPLETE
Room trace log updating from 5 to 57 events
missingEvidence: Hover state or expanded view of the truncated research text

defects.observed: Research column text is truncated with ellipses.
defects.fix: Expand column width or provide a tooltip hover state to show full text.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Automate account research by triggering NodeAgents to enrich pending CRM records with real-time company data and tracking the execution in the live room trace.
